prompt_text:
### Demographics: 40-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.8 kg; Height 153.8 cm; BMI 19.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 10.2%; 3 months ago 10.7%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 257mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 226mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 47.8kg; 9 months ago 45.9kg; 6 months ago 45.3kg; 3 months ago 48.3kg; current 46.8kg), Height (12 months ago 153.8cm; 9 months ago 153.8cm; 6 months ago 153.8cm; 3 months ago 153.8cm; current 153.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 125U/L; 9 months ago 123U/L; 6 months ago 122U/L; 3 months ago 123U/L; current 121U/L), AST (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 101U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 105U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 70mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 70mL/min/1.73m²; current 68mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 38mg/g; 9 months ago 57mg/g; 6 months ago 54mg/g; 3 months ago 55mg/g; current 44mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 67mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.99 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
